Understanding Web Extraction

Published on March 10, 2024

Web extraction is a powerful technique for converting HTML content into structured formats. This article explores the fundamentals.

Getting Started

Before you begin, make sure you have the necessary tools installed:

  • A modern web browser
  • Basic knowledge of HTML structure
  • Understanding of extraction libraries

Key Concepts

There are several important concepts to understand:

  1. DOM parsing and traversal
  2. Content extraction strategies
  3. Format conversion techniques

Code Example

Here's a simple example:

func Extract(html string) string {
    doc := parse(html)
    return extractText(doc)
}

Conclusion

Web extraction enables automated content processing at scale.
